title: Missing diagnostic settings on a disposable resource

execution.limitation: CI executes a scoped synthetic ARM transcript; it does not prove live diagnostic-setting removal, restoration, or Azure cleanup.

prohibited_actions: disable logging on persistent or shared resources

preconditions: Deploy a low-cost disposable resource that supports diagnostics
baseline: Collect diagnostic settings and destination freshness
injection: Remove the fixture diagnostic setting through the scenario template only

expected.observation: One disposable resource has no required diagnostic setting.

retest: Submit one synthetic event if supported and confirm query freshness
cleanup: Delete the disposable resource and its setting
Do not alter shared workspace retention or content
